{
  "logs": [
    {
      "@timestamp": "2026-05-27T14:00:00.000Z",
      "message": "An account was successfully logged on.",
      "log.original": "An account was successfully logged on.",
      "event.provider": "Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing",
      "event.category": "authentication",
      "event.outcome": "success",
      "event.action": "logged-on",
      "host.hostname": "DESKTOP-ABC123",
      "host.os.platform": "windows",
      "user.name": "alice",
      "organization.id": 1,
      "organization.name": "Acme Inc."
    },
    {
      "@timestamp": "2026-05-27T14:01:30.000Z",
      "message": "A logon was attempted using explicit credentials.",
      "log.original": "A logon was attempted using explicit credentials.",
      "event.provider": "Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing",
      "event.category": "authentication",
      "event.outcome": "unknown",
      "event.action": "logged-on",
      "host.hostname": "SERVER-XYZ789",
      "host.os.platform": "windows",
      "user.name": "bob",
      "organization.id": 2,
      "organization.name": "Globex Corp"
    },
    {
      "@timestamp": "2026-05-27T14:02:00.000Z",
      "message": "An attempt was made to reset an account's password.",
      "log.original": "An attempt was made to reset an account's password.",
      "event.provider": "Microsoft-Windows-Security-Auditing",
      "event.category": "iam",
      "event.outcome": "success",
      "event.action": "user-password-reset",
      "host.hostname": "DC-PRIMARY",
      "host.os.platform": "windows",
      "user.name": "charlie",
      "organization.id": 3,
      "organization.name": "Initech LLC"
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "next_page_token": null
  }
}

responses.body:
{
    "agents": [
      {{#repeat 9}}
      {
        "id": {{int 1 9}},
        "version": "{{oneOf (array '0.13.12' '0.13.10' '0.13.8')}}",
        "arch": "x86_64",
        "win_build_number": {{oneOf (array '19043' '19044' '22000' '17763' '20348')}},
        "domain_name": "{{faker 'internet.domainName'}}",
        "created_at": "{{date '2022-05-01' '2022-05-30' "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"}}",
        "hostname": "{{oneOf (array 'Laptop' 'Workstation' 'Desktop' 'Server')}}-{{faker 'word.adjective'}}",
        "ipv4_address": "{{ipv4}}",
        "external_ip": "{{ipv4}}",
        "mac_addresses": ["{{faker 'internet.mac'}}", "{{faker 'internet.mac'}}"],
        "updated_at": "{{date '2022-06-01' '2022-06-30' "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"}}",
        "last_survey_at": "{{faker 'date.recent'}}",
        "last_callback_at": "{{faker 'date.recent'}}",
        "account_id": 1,
        "organization_id": {{int 1 10}},
        "os": "{{oneOf (array 'Windows 10 Pro' 'Windows 11 Pro' 'Windows Server 2019' 'Windows Server 2022')}}",
        "service_pack_major": 0,
        "service_pack_minor": 0,
        "tags": {{{someOf (array 'SQL' 'VIP' 'Critical' 'Excluded' 'temp') 1 2 true}}},
        "os_major": 10,
        "os_minor": 0,
        "version_number": null
      },
      {{/repeat}}
      {
        "id": 10,
        "version": "{{oneOf (array '0.13.12' '0.13.10' '0.13.8')}}",
        "arch": "x86_64",
        "win_build_number": {{oneOf (array '19043' '19044' '22000' '17763' '20348')}},
        "domain_name": "{{faker 'internet.domainName'}}",
        "created_at": "{{date '2022-05-01' '2022-05-30' "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"}}",
        "hostname": "{{oneOf (array 'Laptop' 'Workstation' 'Desktop' 'Server')}}-{{faker 'word.adjective'}}",
        "ipv4_address": "{{ipv4}}",
        "external_ip": "{{ipv4}}",
        "mac_addresses": ["{{faker 'internet.mac'}}", "{{faker 'internet.mac'}}"],
        "updated_at": "{{date '2022-06-01' '2022-06-30' "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"}}",
        "last_survey_at": "{{faker 'date.recent'}}",
        "last_callback_at": "{{faker 'date.recent'}}",
        "account_id": {{int 1 4}},
        "organization_id": {{int 1 20}},
        "os": "{{oneOf (array 'Windows 10 Pro' 'Windows 11 Pro' 'Windows Server 2019' 'Windows Server 2022')}}",
        "service_pack_major": 0,
        "service_pack_minor": 0,
        "tags": {{{someOf (array 'SQL' 'VIP' 'Critical' 'Excluded' 'temp') 1 2 true}}},
        "os_major": 10,
        "os_minor": 0,
        "version_number": null
      }
    ],
    "pagination": {
      "pagination": {
      "current_page": 1,
      "current_page_count": 1,
      "limit": 10,
      "total_count": 20,
      "next_page": 2,
      "next_page_url": "https://api.huntress.io/v1/agents?page=2&limit=10"
    }
}

responses.body:
{
    "incident_reports": [
      {{#repeat 9}}
      {
        "id": {{int 1 100}},
        "status": "{{oneOf (array 'sent' 'closed' 'dismissed')}}",
        "summary": null,
        "body": "<Content>",
        "updated_at": "{{date '2022-06-01' '2022-06-30' "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"}}",
        "agent_id": {{int 1 20}},
        "status_updated_at": "{{date '2022-06-01' '2022-06-30' "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"}}",
        "organization_id": {{int 1 10}},
        "sent_at": "{{date '2022-05-28' '2022-05-30' "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"}}",
        "account_id": 1,
        "subject": "{{oneOf (array 'LOW' 'HIGH' 'CRITICAL')}} - Incident on {{oneOf (array 'Laptop' 'Workstation' 'Desktop' 'Server')}}-{{faker 'word.adjective'}}",
        "created_by_id": null,
        "remediation_instructions": null,
        "footholds": "<Content>",
        "notes": "<Content>",
        "severity": "{{oneOf (array 'low' 'high' 'critical')}}",
        "assigned_to_id": null,
        "closed_at": null,
        "indicator_types": {{{someOf (array 'footholds' 'monitored_files' 'process_detections' 'ransomware_canaries' 'antivirus_detections') 1 4 true}}},
        "indicator_counts": {
            "footholds": {{int 0 2}},
            "monitored_files": {{int 0 2}},
            "process_detections": {{int 0 2}},
            "ransomware_canaries": {{int 0 2}},
            "antivirus_detections": {{int 0 2}}
        },
        "details": {}
      },
      {{/repeat}}
      {
        "id": 10,
        "status": "{{oneOf (array 'sent' 'closed' 'dismissed')}}",
        "summary": null,
        "body": "<Content>",
        "updated_at": "{{date '2022-06-01' '2022-06-30' "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"}}",
        "agent_id": {{int 1 20}},
        "status_updated_at": "{{date '2022-06-01' '2022-06-30' "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"}}",
        "organization_id": {{int 1 10}},
        "sent_at": "{{date '2022-05-28' '2022-05-30' "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"}}",
        "account_id": 1,
        "subject": "{{oneOf (array 'LOW' 'HIGH' 'CRITICAL')}} - Incident on {{oneOf (array 'Laptop' 'Workstation' 'Desktop' 'Server')}}-{{faker 'word.adjective'}}",
        "created_by_id": null,
        "remediation_instructions": null,
        "footholds": "<Content>",
        "notes": "<Content>",
        "severity": "{{oneOf (array 'low' 'high' 'critical')}}",
        "assigned_to_id": null,
        "closed_at": null,
        "indicator_types": {{{someOf (array 'footholds' 'monitored_files' 'process_detections' 'ransomware_canaries' 'antivirus_detections') 1 4 true}}},
        "indicator_counts": {
            "footholds": {{int 0 2}},
            "monitored_files": {{int 0 2}},
            "process_detections": {{int 0 2}},
            "ransomware_canaries": {{int 0 2}},
            "antivirus_detections": {{int 0 2}}
        },
        "details": {}
      }
    ],
    "pagination": {
      "pagination": {
      "current_page": 1,
      "current_page_count": 1,
      "limit": 10,
      "total_count": 20,
      "next_page": 2,
      "next_page_url": "https://api.huntress.io/v1/incident_reports?page=2&limit=10"
    }
}
